description:
Operating Area: Balearic Islands

A 2019 launch and 2023 refit by AE Interior, Sunreef 60 DAWN features both, a smart and charter-friendly layout as well as impressive and relaxing social areas at the bow, stern cockpit and flybridge.

DAWN’s light-filled interiors provide a relaxing and harmonious feel by its neutral and calming, yet stylish decor. Up to 8 guests can enjoy sophisticated accommodation in the yacht’s three classy ensuite cabins plus the stylish master suite. The bright main saloon, generous stern cockpit and ample front terrace merge into one luminous semi-open lounge area with a functional galley, cozy settees, a widescreen LED TV and a big table for 8 guests. While the well-equipped galley provides for fine cuisine, the indoor herb garden ensures a steady supply of freshness to DAWN’s rich menu.

Up on the catamaran’s impressive flybridge, guests can gather for lounging and drinks on the welcoming and pampering sofas. Versatility of this area allows it to also serve as a perfect space for yoga or light exercising, all while enjoying the spectacular sea view.

A lucky find for water sports enthusiasts, DAWN boasts a great selection of all new water toys, including towables, diving scooters, drone submarine for underwater exploration, wakeboard, water skis and stand-up paddle boards.

This dream yacht is operated by a dedicated and experienced crew of  professionals ensuring top service and a memorable summer charter experience in the Balearics (contact us for the detailed schedule).

crew.name: Federico Arroyo
crew.bio:
Argentinian

Federico is an Argentinian Captain who spent a big part of his life travelling around the world, working as a Captain, as well as a dive instructor and a lifeguard.
He set his choice on operating sailing yachts, his true passion.
He will easily convey his enthusiasm for the sea and sailing.
Together with his crew, he creates a spoiling luxury experience for his guests on Dawn, while always ensuring a safe environment.
His main hobbies being surfing, diving, trolling and spearfishing, as well as kite surfing, Federico gladly assists the guests in water activities with great pleasure.

crew.name: Camila Seiza Adrover
crew.bio:
With over 15 years of international culinary experience, Camila brings warmth, creativity, and deep dedication to her role as Chef. She has worked across South America and Europe, including running her own restaurant for six years.

In recent years, she has specialized in personalized private dining—crafting tailored menus that reflect both her clients’ preferences and her love for cultural fusion. Known for her adaptability, culinary finesse, and calm under pressure, Camila now brings her refined, guest-focused service to the world of yachting, blending her passion for cooking with life at sea.

crew.name: Lucia Gines
crew.bio:
A passionate ocean traveler with a background in diving and sailing, Lucia brings energy, versatility, and a deep connection to the sea. A certified Divemaster and Assistant Diving Instructor, she has spent over a decade exploring the world—both above and below the waterline. Her recent Atlantic crossing by sail was a milestone that deepened her commitment to life on the water.

With experience on both sailing and motor yachts up to 55m, Lucia is confident in guest service, tender driving, watchkeeping, and all-around deck and interior duties. Calm, adaptable, and fueled by a true love for the sea, she’s a valuable and upbeat presence on board, always ready to go the extra mile for guests and crew alike.
